case_title: CACV OF COLORADO, LLC VS. ALEX N GIANG et al

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACV OF COLORADO, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT GIANG, ALEX N DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-03-2004 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-04-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         NOV-18-2004
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-19-2005 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). THE DEC-03-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CACV OF COLORADO, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GIANG, ALEX N $2,420.59 PRINCIPAL, $235.24 ATTORNEY FEES, $244.05 INTEREST, $230.80 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,130.68, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
